prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Here's a quick pep talk to get you going:

You've got this! You've been putting off this task all morning, but now it's time to tackle it head-on. Remember that the only way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing. You've already overcome the hardest part, which is getting to the point where you're ready to start.

Take a deep breath, gather your energy, and remind yourself that you're capable of crushing this task. You've done tough things before, and you can do them again. Break it down into smaller, manageable chunks if you need to, and focus on making progress one step at a time.

You've got the momentum now, and you're ready to roll. Don't let procrastination hold you back any longer. You're strong, you're focused, and you're going to get this done. So go out there and show that task who's boss!

Go get 'em!
